# Content catalog

<!-- Generated by scripts/build-catalog.mjs (runs with `pnpm typecheck` / `pnpm catalog`). Do not edit by hand. -->

## Modules (`content/modules/`)

### control
- **counter** — Counts trigger rising-edges, wrapping at N — beat-stepped scene logic. `counter(ctx, { trigger: ctx.input("kick"), wrap: 4 })` _[counter, step, trigger, sequencer]_
- **envelope** — Attack/release follower — fast rise, slow fall (punchier than lag). `envelope(ctx, { input: ctx.input("kick"), attack: 0.005, release: 0.4 })` _[envelope, follower, smooth, audio-reactive]_
- **gate** — Hysteresis threshold — 0/1 gate that never chatters on a hovering level. `gate(ctx, { input: ctx.input("bass"), threshold: 0.4, hysteresis: 0.1 })` _[gate, threshold, logic, trigger]_
- **lag** — Smooths a signal toward its target with a time constant. `lag(ctx, { input: ctx.audio.band("bass"), seconds: 0.08 })` _[smooth, filter]_
- **lfo** — Beat-synced LFO (sine/saw/square) in 0..1. `lfo(ctx, { shape: "sine", periodBeats: 8 })` _[modulation, beat-sync]_
- **noiseSignal** — Smooth fractal value-noise wander in a range — the Noise CHOP for driving any param. `noiseSignal(ctx, { rate: 0.4, lo: -1, hi: 1, octaves: 3 })` _[noise, modulation, wander, lfo, control]_
- **remap** — Maps a signal from one range to another with a linear/exp/smooth curve. `remap(ctx, { input: kickEnv, outMin: 1, outMax: 1.4, curve: "smooth" })` _[math, range, curve, glue]_
- **sampleHold** — Samples the input on each trigger rising-edge and holds it (new value per kick). `sampleHold(ctx, { input: lfo(ctx, { periodBeats: 3 }), trigger: ctx.input("kick") })` _[sample, hold, trigger, step]_
- **spring** — Bouncy spring-physics follower — overshoots and rings (stiffness/damping). `spring(ctx, { input: ctx.input("kick"), stiffness: 160, damping: 8 })` _[spring, physics, bounce, follower]_

### source
- **automata** — Cyclic cellular automaton — random cells self-organise into rotating spiral waves. `automata(ctx, { states: 14, reseed: ctx.input("kick") })` _[cellular-automata, cyclic, spirals, simulation, generative]_
- **blobs** — Drifting metaball ink blobs that merge and split, lava-lamp style. r/b = ink mask, g = inner-core glow. `blobs(ctx, { count: 6, size: 0.14, speed: 0.5 })` _[organic, metaballs, lava-lamp, blobby]_
- **checker** — Checkerboard/grid cells with optional grid lines and scroll. `checker(ctx, { count: 8, line: 0.06, scroll: 0.5 })` _[checker, grid, pattern, base]_
- **fireflies** — A swarm of drifting glow-points, each twinkling at its own rate, color and intensity, with white-hot cores. `fireflies(ctx, { count: 28, size: 0.035, hueSpread: 0.4 })` _[particles, sparkle, organic, night, audio-reactive]_
- **gradient** — Linear/radial/angular palette ramp — scrolling gradients across the active palette. `gradient(ctx, { mode: "radial", scroll: 0.05, repeat: 2 })` _[gradient, ramp, palette, base]_
- **image** — An image file drawn aspect-correct, placed by an attachable Transform (2D/3D). `image(ctx, { url: imgUrl, transform: { rotate: angleSig, scale: 0.5 } })` _[image, texture, media, base]_
- **julia** — Smooth escape-time Julia set in grayscale; c picks the fractal, morph breathes it (compose with colorize). `julia(ctx, { cx: -0.8, cy: 0.156, morph: 0.05, iterations: 250 })` _[fractal, julia, morph, math]_
- **mandelbrot** — Smooth escape-time Mandelbrot set in grayscale (compose with colorize). `mandelbrot(ctx, { cx: -0.7436, cy: 0.1314, scale: zoomSig, iterations: 250 })` _[fractal, mandelbrot, zoom, math]_
- **marble** — Iterated domain-warp marble: fractal noise folded through itself into agate/oil veins (grayscale — colorize). `marble(ctx, { scale: 3, warp: 4, evolve: 0.1 })` _[marble, domain-warp, fbm, noise, organic, generative]_
- **noise** — Animated FBM noise field (monochrome). `noise(ctx, { scale: 3, speed: 0.2 })` _[texture, organic]_
- **noiseField** — TouchDesigner-style fractal noise: pickable basis, live harmonics/gain/exponent, 3D flow (grey or palette). `noiseField(ctx, { type: "perlin", scale: 3, octaves: 5, flowX: 0.2 })` _[noise, fractal, fbm, worley, texture, organic]_
- **noodles** — Wavy procedural noodle strands (premultiplied alpha) that undulate and slurp on an energy signal. `noodles(ctx, { count: 9, wiggle: 0.05, energy: kickEnv })` _[noodles, strands, organic, pho, audio-reactive, overlay]_
- **osc** — Scrolling sinusoidal stripes with optional RGB phase offset. `osc(ctx, { freq: 10, sync: 0.25, offset: 0.1 })` _[pattern, stripes, classic]_
- **physarum** — Slime-mold agents depositing into a diffusing trail field — grows living vein/neuron networks (GPU). `physarum(ctx, { count: 160000, sensorAngle: ctx.input("kick"), deposit: 0.12 })` _[physarum, slime-mold, agents, simulation, organic, generative, audio-reactive, gpu]_
- **plasma** — Classic sine-interference plasma, colored through the palette ramp. `plasma(ctx, { scale: 3, speed: 0.5 })` _[plasma, retro, interference, palette]_
- **pulseRings** — Concentric ink rings in a soft core with a teal-to-magenta glow palette. `pulseRings(ctx, { energy: kickEnv, hue: lfo(ctx, { periodBeats: 16 }) })` _[rings, radial, audio-reactive, ink]_
- **reactionDiffusion** — Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion: living coral/fingerprint Turing patterns, feed/kill reshape live. `reactionDiffusion(ctx, { feed: 0.037, kill: 0.06, inject: ctx.input("kick") })` _[reaction-diffusion, gray-scott, simulation, organic, generative, audio-reactive]_
- **render3d** — Renders GeoNodes (meshes/models) through a camera into the TexNode chain. `render3d(ctx, { world: [torus(ctx, { spin: 0.6 })], cam: orbitCam(ctx, {}) })` _[3d, bridge, render, scene, stateful]_
- **ripples** — Expanding concentric ripple wavefronts from scattered impact points (premultiplied) — rain-on-water, splashing on an energy signal. `ripples(ctx, { count: 6, reach: 0.6, energy: kickEnv })` _[ripples, water, rings, liquid, pho, audio-reactive, overlay]_
- **shape** — SDF circle/ring/rect/polygon with soft edges and palette fill (premultiplied alpha). `shape(ctx, { kind: "ring", radius: kickEnv, thickness: 0.04, soft: 0.05 })` _[shape, circle, ring, mask, base]_
- **softServe** — Upright vanilla soft-serve swirl: a hooked teardrop of fat coil bands climbing forever, with a pour ribbon on top (premultiplied alpha). `softServe(ctx, { coils: 4, flow: 0.4, energy: bassSig })` _[ice-cream, swirl, spiral, vanilla, overlay, audio-reactive]_
- **solid** — A flat color field — backdrops, kick-driven flashes, palette swatches. `solid(ctx, { paletteStop: 4, level: ctx.input("kick") })` _[color, constant, flash, base]_
- **sprinkles** — Candy sprinkles flung in from every edge angle that land on a soft-serve swirl and stick, riding the coil climb (premultiplied alpha). `sprinkles(ctx, { count: burstCountSig, burst: ctx.input("kick") })` _[ice-cream, sprinkles, particles, overlay, burst, audio-reactive, fun]_
- **spriteSwarm** — Many flying sprites from a single atlas texture (runtime count, one sampler). `spriteSwarm(ctx, { url: atlasUrl, cols: 3, rows: 2, maxCount: 18, count: amountSig })` _[sprites, atlas, particles, overlay, fun]_
- **starAnise** — A drifting field of eight-lobed star-anise spice pods with seed glints (premultiplied), flaring on an energy signal. `starAnise(ctx, { count: 7, size: 0.12, energy: kickEnv })` _[star-anise, spice, pho, botanical, organic, audio-reactive, overlay]_
- **text** — A text string drawn to a texture, placed like image (titles, lyrics, numbers). `text(ctx, { text: "DROP", weight: 900, transform: { scale: 0.4 } })` _[text, type, title, overlay, base]_
- **video** — A video clip drawn aspect-correct like image, with live speed/scrub/loop control (muted). `video(ctx, { url: mediaUrl("C:/VJ/clip.mp4"), speed: speedParam.signal() })` _[video, clip, media, texture, base]_
- **voronoi** — Animated Voronoi/cellular noise (F1 distance, monochrome). `voronoi(ctx, { scale: 6, speed: 0.4 })` _[voronoi, cellular, organic, texture]_
- **waffleCone** — A golden solid 3D waffle cone (tapered walls, domed perspective mouth, converging diamond hatch, throat shadow) for an ice-cream swirl to sit inside. `waffleCone(ctx, { topY: 0.42, width: 0.26, waffle: 0.6, mouth: 0.32 })` _[ice-cream, cone, waffle, overlay, base, 3d]_
- **waveField** — 2D wave-equation ripple tank: real propagating, interfering wavefronts; beat drops splashes. `waveField(ctx, { speed: 0.3, impact: ctx.input("kick") })` _[wave, ripples, simulation, water, interference, audio-reactive]_
- **webcam** — Live camera input drawn aspect-correct like image (mirrored by default). `webcam(ctx, { mirror: 1, transform: { scale: 1 } })` _[camera, webcam, live, media, base]_

### effect
- **bloom** — Glow: bright pixels bleed over the image (threshold → blur → add). `bloom(ctx, { input: src, level: 0.6, intensity: kickEnv })` _[bloom, glow, stateful, finish]_ ⛓chainable
- **blur** — Separable gaussian blur with a live pixel radius. `blur(ctx, { input: src, radius: 12 })` _[blur, soft, gaussian, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **colorize** — Luminance-to-color mapping through animatable cosine palettes (PALETTES presets). `colorize(ctx, { input: src, palette: driftSig, bands: 2, shift: 0.1 })` _[color, palette, gradient, grade]_ ⛓chainable
- **crt** — CRT look: barrel curvature, scanlines, edge fringing in one step. `crt(ctx, { input: src, scan: 0.35, curve: 0.15 })` _[crt, retro, scanlines, finish, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **displace** — Warps the input's UVs by a displacer map (or built-in animated noise). `displace(ctx, { input: src, map: voronoi(ctx, {}), amount: 0.08 })` _[displace, warp, organic, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **echo** — Blends an N-frames-ago copy over the live frame (video echo/ghosting). `echo(ctx, { input: src, delay: 10, amount: 0.5 })` _[echo, delay, ghost, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **feedback** — Ping-pong video feedback with zoomable trails. `feedback(ctx, { input: src, amount: 0.9, zoom: 1.01 })` _[stateful, trails, classic]_ ⛓chainable
- **flyby** — Image sprites (logos, critters) flying around the screen over any input. `flyby(ctx, { input: chain, urls: hippoUrls, size: 0.16, speed: 0.6 })` _[sprites, overlay, composite, fun]_
- **glitch** — Slice tearing, RGB split, scanlines and row dropouts over any input. `glitch(ctx, { input: src, amount: 0.6, burst: kickEnv, split: 0.5 })` _[glitch, datamosh, distortion, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **hsv** — Hue rotation, saturation and value adjust — the color half of grading. `hsv(ctx, { input: src, hue: lfo(ctx, { periodBeats: 32 }) })` _[hue, saturation, color, grade]_ ⛓chainable
- **invert** — Inverts colors, blendable 0..1 — the negative flash. `invert(ctx, { input: src, amount: ctx.input("kick") })` _[invert, negative, flash]_ ⛓chainable
- **kaleido** — Mirrored polar-fold kaleidoscope over any input, with rotation and zoom. `kaleido(ctx, { input: src, segments: 6, rotate: spinSig, amount: 0.9 })` _[kaleidoscope, mirror, symmetry, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **kaleidoZoom** — Endless fractal-style dive into any input through a mirrored kaleido fold. `kaleidoZoom(ctx, { input: src, zoom: depthSig, segments: 6, twist: 0.5 })` _[kaleidoscope, zoom, infinite, fractal, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **key** — Keys a color (chroma) or dark pixels (luma) to transparency for layering. `key(ctx, { input: cam, mode: "luma", tolerance: 0.25 })` _[key, chroma, luma, alpha, layer]_ ⛓chainable
- **levels** — Gain, bias and gamma adjustment on an image. `levels(ctx, { input: src, gain: 1.2, gamma: 1.1 })` _[color, grade]_ ⛓chainable
- **marbleWarp** — Warps any input through an iterated domain-warp noise field — liquid-marble / heat-haze smear. `marbleWarp(ctx, { input: src, amount: 0.12, warp: 4 })` _[marble, domain-warp, displace, warp, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **mirror** — Folds the frame across an angled line — one-axis symmetry. `mirror(ctx, { input: src, angle: 0, offset: 0 })` _[mirror, symmetry, fold, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **mixer** — Blends two TexNodes: crossfade/add/multiply/screen/difference on a fader. `mixer(ctx, { input: deckA, b: deckB, mode: "crossfade", mix: fader.signal() })` _[mix, blend, crossfade, composite, deck]_
- **neon** — Turns a stroke/mask source into a glowing neon tube (white-hot core, palette body, flicker) — premultiplied for over+bloom. `neon(ctx, { input: text(ctx, { text: "PHO" }), intensity: kickEnv, flicker })` _[neon, glow, tube, sign, stylize]_ ⛓chainable
- **over** — Alpha-composites an overlay TexNode on top of an input (logo/still overlays). `over(ctx, { input: chain, overlay: imagePlate(ctx, { url: logoUrl }), opacity: 1 })` _[composite, overlay, blend, alpha]_
- **paletteMap** — Recolors an input's luminance through the active global palette ramp. `paletteMap(ctx, { input: src, shift: scrollSig })` _[color, palette, ramp, grade]_ ⛓chainable
- **pixelate** — Smooth slider-driven mosaic pixelation; free when amount is 0. `pixelate(ctx, { input: src, amount: 0.4 })` _[pixelate, mosaic, retro, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **posterize** — Quantizes colors to N steps per channel (poster/print-crush look). `posterize(ctx, { input: src, steps: 4 })` _[posterize, quantize, crush, retro]_ ⛓chainable
- **rgbSplit** — RGB channel split (chromatic aberration) with live amount + angle. `rgbSplit(ctx, { input: src, amount: kickEnv.map((k) => k * 0.02) })` _[rgb, aberration, split, glitch, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **threshold** — Keeps pixels above a luma level (soft edge), masks the rest to transparent. `threshold(ctx, { input: src, level: 0.6, softness: 0.1 })` _[threshold, mask, luma]_ ⛓chainable
- **tile** — Repeats the frame into an X×Y wall, optionally mirror-alternating for seamless edges. `tile(ctx, { input: src, countX: 3, countY: 3, mirrorTiles: 1 })` _[tile, repeat, grid, wall, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **transform** — Moves/spins/3D-tilts/scales/mirrors any input as a layer (live Transform). `transform(ctx, { input: src, x: 0.3, scale: 0.5, rotateY: flipSig })` _[transform, 3d, layout, layer, stateful]_ ⛓chainable
- **vignette** — Darkens the frame's corners (radius/softness/amount) — the classic finish. `vignette(ctx, { input: src, amount: 0.7 })` _[vignette, finish, frame]_ ⛓chainable

### geo
- **box** — A box mesh (GeoNode) with live spin/tumble/glow/scale — render via render3d. `box(ctx, { size: [1, 1, 1], spin: 0.8, color: "#3fb7f0" })` _[3d, primitive, mesh, geo]_
- **displaceGeo** — Displaces a mesh's vertices through an animated field (terrain, breathing meshes). `displaceGeo(ctx, { input: plane(ctx, { segments: 48 }), amount: ctx.input("bass") })` _[3d, displace, terrain, noise, geo]_
- **flock** — A boids flock (separation/alignment/cohesion) as oriented instances — render via render3d. `render3d(ctx, { world: [flock(ctx, { count: 220, cohesion: ctx.input("bass") })], cam: orbitCam(ctx, {}) })` _[3d, boids, flocking, agents, particles, audio-reactive, geo]_
- **flowParticles** — Particles advected through a divergence-free ABC flow field — silky streamlines; render via render3d. `render3d(ctx, { world: [flowParticles(ctx, { count: 3000, speed: ctx.input("bass") })], cam: orbitCam(ctx, {}) })` _[3d, particles, flow, curl, advection, audio-reactive, geo]_
- **model** — A glTF/FBX model file as a GeoNode (auto-centered + height-normalized), spin live. `model(ctx, { url: mediaFsUrl(0, "3DModels/Hippo3D/Hippopotamus 3D Model.fbx"), spin: 0.5 })` _[3d, model, gltf, fbx, mesh, geo]_
- **orbitCam** — An orbiting perspective camera (CamNode) for render3d — radius/height/speed live. `render3d(ctx, { world: torus(ctx, {}), cam: orbitCam(ctx, { radius: 2.5, speed: 0.4 }) })` _[3d, camera, orbit, geo]_
- **particleEmitter** — Particles emitted from a mesh's surface (rate/lifetime/speed/turbulence live). `particleEmitter(ctx, { surface: hippo, rate: 400, turbulence: ctx.input("hats") })` _[3d, particles, emitter, surface, audio-reactive, geo]_
- **plane** — A subdivided plane mesh (GeoNode) — flat terrain substrate or upright billboard. `plane(ctx, { size: [3, 2], segments: 48 })` _[3d, primitive, plane, terrain, geo]_
- **pointCloud** — A mesh's vertices as glowing instanced points (follows displacement live). `pointCloud(ctx, { source: displacedPlane, size: 0.012, color: "#9ae6ff" })` _[3d, points, wireframe, rutt-etra, geo]_
- **sphere** — A sphere mesh (GeoNode) with live spin/tumble/glow/scale — render via render3d. `sphere(ctx, { radius: 0.6, glow: kickEnv, color: "#f03fb7" })` _[3d, primitive, mesh, geo]_
- **strangeAttractor** — A chaotic attractor (Lorenz/Aizawa/Thomas/Halvorsen) traced as a glowing 3D point set — render via pointCloud. `pointCloud(ctx, { source: strangeAttractor(ctx, { kind: "lorenz", points: 16000 }) })` _[3d, attractor, chaos, points, strange-attractor, generative, geo]_
- **torus** — A torus mesh (GeoNode) with live spin/tumble/glow/scale — render via render3d. `torus(ctx, { radius: 0.7, tube: 0.22, tumble: 0.5 })` _[3d, primitive, mesh, geo]_
- **tube** — A cylinder beam (GeoNode) — light shafts and tunnel ribs, spin/glow live. `tube(ctx, { radius: 0.05, length: 3, glow: kickEnv, color: "#9ae6ff" })` _[3d, primitive, tube, beam, geo]_

## Scenes (`content/scenes/`)

- **attractor-cloud** — A strange attractor (Aizawa) as a glowing point cloud, orbiting in 3D; the kick flares the bloom. params: cam.speed, cam.radius, cam.height, cloud.spin, cloud.size, finish.bloom, finish.glow, glow.punch, finish.vignette _[3d, attractor, chaos, points, generative, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **beeple-wall** — Beeple's golden city under a kaleidoscope-folded tunnel loop — two live video decks with speed/scrub on faders and the kick punching the levels. params: city.speed, city.scrubbing, city.scrub, tunnel.speed, tunnel.opacity, tunnel.segments, punch _[video, media, beeple, kaleidoscope, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **biolume** — Deep-sea bioluminescence: breathing cellular water lit by drifting plankton blobs and glow-points — bass swells the breathing, the kick blooms the light. params: cells.scale, cells.breathe, cells.drift, warp.amount, warp.surge, plankton.size, plankton.glow, flies.count, flies.size, color.drift, glow.bloom, glow.release _[organic, bioluminescent, deep-sea, audio-reactive, ambient]_ ⚡inputs: bass, kick
- **broth-surface** — Looking straight down into the bowl: golden broth simmering under floating fat globules and green herb flecks, heat-shimmering, with concentric ripples spreading from every drop — the kick splashes the surface, the bass swells the simmer. params: broth.scale, broth.speed, broth.heat, broth.swell, oil.amount, oil.size, oil.speed, shimmer.amount, ripple.reach, ripple.width, ripple.speed, ripple.splash, herbs.count, herbs.size, herbs.glow, bloom.level, bloom.intensity, bloom.radius, vignette _[pho, broth, liquid, ripples, organic, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass
- **camera-ghost** — Your camera, luma-keyed onto a palette wash, ghosted by frame echoes, poster-crushed — the kick flashes the negative. params: key.tolerance, key.softness, ghost.amount, ghost.delay, crush.steps, flash _[webcam, key, echo, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **coral-bloom** — A living reaction-diffusion organism: coral grows and mitoses, kicks spray new blooms, kill-rate drifts the regime. params: grow.feed, grow.swell, grow.kill, grow.drift, grow.evolve, grow.chunk, bloom.spray, color.spread, color.rim, finish.bloom, finish.glow, finish.vignette _[reaction-diffusion, gray-scott, organic, generative, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **cyclic-spiral** — A cyclic cellular automaton spiraling forever through the palette; the kick flares the bloom. params: ca.states, ca.threshold, ca.speed, color.front, finish.bloom, finish.glow, glow.punch, finish.vignette _[cellular-automata, cyclic, spirals, generative, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **deck-mixer** — A two-deck video mixer: crossfader between clips, hue on a slow ride, kick-driven RGB split and frame echo for the drop. params: mix.fader, deckA.speed, deckB.speed, color.hue, color.saturation, drop.split, drop.echo, drop.delay _[video, mixer, deck, vj, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **fireflies** — Drifting multicolored fireflies that twinkle at their own rates and flare on the kick. params: glow, swarm.size, swarm.speed, blink.twinkle, blink.sparkle, swarm.variety, flare, fx.glitch, swarm.count, fx.trail _[particles, sparkle, audio-reactive, ambient]_ ⚡inputs: kick, energy
- **flock-swarm** — A boids murmuration wheeling in 3D — bass gathers the flock, the kick flares the glow. params: cam.speed, cam.radius, cam.height, flight.speed, flock.cohesion, flock.gather, flock.separation, flock.alignment, boid.size, finish.bloom, finish.glow, glow.punch, finish.vignette _[3d, boids, flocking, agents, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **flow-field** — Particles riding a divergence-free flow field into silky vortex streams; bass surges the flow. params: cam.speed, cam.radius, cam.height, flow.speed, flow.surge, flow.scale, flow.evolve, particle.size, finish.bloom, finish.glow, glow.punch, finish.vignette _[3d, particles, flow, curl, advection, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **geo-rave** — Three primitives — a tumbling torus, a spinning box, a kick-glowing sphere — under an orbiting camera, smeared through video feedback. params: cam.speed, cam.radius, cam.height, world.spin, world.pulse, trail.amount, trail.zoom _[3d, geo, primitives, audio-reactive, feedback]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **gradient** — Scrolling horizontal gradient across the active palette's five stops. params: speed _[palette, gradient, minimal]_
- **hippo-swarm** — Glowing particles boil off the 3D hippo's hide — hats whip the swarm into turbulence, the kick punches the key light. params: swarm.rate, swarm.lifetime, swarm.chaos, swarm.lift, hippo.spin, punch, cam.speed _[3d, particles, model, hippo, audio-reactive, flagship]_ ⚡inputs: kick, hats
- **hippo3d** — The 3D hippo, height-normalized and slowly turning under an orbiting camera, kick punching the key light, feedback smearing the turn. params: hippo.spin, hippo.size, cam.speed, cam.radius, punch, trail _[3d, geo, model, fbx, hippo, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **julia** — Julia morph: pick a classic constant and let c orbit so the whole filigree breathes, while cosine palettes drift and scroll. params: shape.constant, shape.morph, shape.radius, shape.zoom, iter, color.palette, color.drift, color.cycle, color.bands _[fractal, morph, palette, generative]_
- **lava** — Slow-breathing ink-blob lava lamp; blobs swell and glow on the kick. params: size, breathe, pulse, speed, wobble, trail _[audio-reactive, organic, lava-lamp]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **mandelbloom** — Mandelbrot with a palette-ramped exterior and a kick-blooming garden inside the black interior; flip palette.source to retint everything. params: zoom.dive, zoom.depth, iter, scroll, garden.warp, garden.amount, garden.bloom, rim, fx.trail, fx.glitch _[fractal, palette, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **mandelbrot** — Mandelbrot dive: ping-pong zooms into pickable interesting points while cosine palettes morph and scroll. params: zoom.point, zoom.dive, zoom.depth, iter, color.palette, color.drift, color.cycle, color.bands _[fractal, zoom, palette, generative]_
- **marble-slab** — Iterated domain-warp marble — agate veins folding and drifting, bass churns the warp. params: marble.scale, marble.warp, marble.swell, marble.drift, color.contrast, finish.bloom, finish.glow, finish.vignette _[marble, domain-warp, noise, organic, palette, audio-reactive]_
- **marble-warp** — RGB stripes smeared through an iterated domain-warp field into liquid marble; bass churns the warp. params: stripes.freq, stripes.rgb, warp.amount, warp.surge, warp.scale, warp.fold, warp.drift, finish.vignette _[marble, domain-warp, displace, stripes, audio-reactive]_
- **neon-bloom** — Neon rings detonate from the center on every kick and bloom over a slow radial palette wash. params: ring.punch, ring.release, ring.width, glow.level, glow.intensity, glow.radius, wash.level _[rings, bloom, palette, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **neon-pho** — A night-market neon sign: a glowing PHỞ wordmark over a cyan bowl with amber steam rising, buzzing and dropping out like failing neon, surging on the kick behind warm CRT glass. params: sign.size, sign.lift, glow.intensity, glow.surge, glow.flicker, bowl.intensity, bowl.size, steam.intensity, steam.rise, bloom.level, bloom.intensity, bloom.radius, glass.scan, glass.curve, wall.level _[neon, sign, text, bloom, crt, pho, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **noise-flow** — A palette-ramped fractal noise field flowing into feedback clouds — bass breathes the scale, the kick blooms it. params: field.scale, field.swell, field.roughness, field.contrast, field.flow, field.evolve, trail.amount, trail.zoom, glow.bloom _[noise, fractal, palette, feedback, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: bass, kick
- **noise-warp** — A clean palette gradient warped by a hidden cellular noise field and folded through a noise-driven kaleidoscope — noise as pure modulator. params: warp.scale, warp.amount, warp.surge, warp.roughness, warp.churn, fold.segments, fold.swirl _[noise, displace, kaleidoscope, modulation, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: bass
- **pho-nebula** — An infinite bowl of cosmic phở: simmering golden broth folded through a slow mandala, steam blooming on the kick, garnish drifting by under a PHỞ marquee. params: broth.simmer, broth.chunk, broth.heat, broth.palette, broth.drift, swirl.segments, swirl.spin, swirl.fold, swirl.swell, steam.trail, steam.bloom, noodles.amount, noodles.wiggle, noodles.curl, noodles.width, noodles.flow, noodles.slurp, garnish.opacity, garnish.count, garnish.size, garnish.speed, badge.opacity, badge.size, badge.bump _[audio-reactive, kaleidoscope, feedback, pho, ambient]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass
- **plasma-wall** — A grid-etched palette plasma tiled into an arcade wall, finished behind curved CRT glass — pure retro warmth. params: plasma.scale, plasma.speed, grid.etch, wall.count, tube.scan, tube.curve, tube.vignette _[plasma, retro, crt, wall, showcase]_
- **prism-array** — A formal array of hard-edged primitives — four corner boxes, a chrome torus, a kick-punched core sphere — folded through a bass-spun kaleidoscope under an orbiting camera. params: cam.speed, cam.radius, cam.height, world.spin, world.punch, fold.segments, fold.drive, fold.amount, glow.kick _[3d, geo, primitives, kaleidoscope, audio-reactive, geometric]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass
- **pulse** — Kick-reactive feedback rings with a slowly drifting palette. params: punch, trail, drift _[audio-reactive, feedback, demo]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass
- **ripple-pool** — A wave-simulation pool: kicks drop splashes whose wavefronts ring out and interfere, ramped through the palette. params: wave.speed, wave.calm, wave.splash, wave.flow, color.depth, color.foam, finish.bloom, finish.glow, finish.vignette _[wave, ripples, water, simulation, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **rutt-etra** — A vertex terrain breathing with the bass, drawn as glowing scan points under a slow orbit — the Rutt-Etra look, three generations later. params: terrain.height, terrain.surge, terrain.scale, terrain.flow, points.size, cam.speed, cam.height _[3d, terrain, points, rutt-etra, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: bass
- **slime-veins** — A living Physarum colony braids glowing vein/neuron networks — kick flares the sensors, bass breathes the swarm. params: colony.agents, colony.speed, colony.breathe, sense.reach, sense.splay, sense.flare, colony.turn, trail.deposit, trail.punch, trail.persist, color.spread, finish.bloom, finish.glow, finish.vignette _[physarum, slime-mold, agents, organic, generative, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass
- **soft-serve** **(live)** — A vanilla soft-serve swirl forever spiraling up in a waffle cone, sprinkles tossed in from all angles that land and stick, over an ice-cream backdrop. params: cream.thickness, cream.coils, cream.flow, cream.hook, cream.ridge, cream.gloss, cream.stream, cream.wobble, cone.width, cone.waffle, cone.mouth, sprinkles.amount, sprinkles.burst, sprinkles.size, sprinkles.cadence, bg.tone, finish.bloom, finish.vignette _[ice-cream, vanilla, swirl, particles, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass
- **spring-rave** — A ring of laser beams on spring physics — every kick bounces and rings instead of easing, hats lift the glow, trails smear the orbit. params: bounce.stiffness, bounce.damping, bounce.amount, beams.shimmer, cam.speed, trail _[3d, beams, spring, physics, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick, hats
- **star-anise** — A slow, dark spice galaxy: star-anise pods tumble and drift through a cinnamon-dust haze while clove specks twinkle — bass swells the haze, the kick flares the pods. An ambient palette-cleanser. params: haze.brightness, haze.scale, haze.speed, haze.swell, pods.size, pods.spin, pods.drift, pods.flare, specks.count, specks.size, specks.glow, bloom.level, bloom.intensity, bloom.radius, vignette _[star-anise, spice, pho, ambient, organic, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass, energy
- **static-haunt** — Broken-broadcast haunting: oscillator bars torn by voronoi, crushed to poster steps and shredded by kick-blasted glitch tears with negative strobes — hats jitter the chroma split while frame echoes ghost behind. params: tear.amount, tear.surge, bars.freq, crush.steps, wreck.amount, wreck.burst, jitter.split, ghost.amount, ghost.delay, strobe.flash _[glitch, strobe, echo, retro, audio-reactive]_ ⚡inputs: kick, hats
- **type-strobe** — Title cards step line-by-line on the kick — each hit re-rolls the placement, the bass gate strobes the backdrop. params: type.size, type.throw, strobe.amount, strobe.threshold _[text, strobe, type, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: kick, bass
- **vinyl-zoom** — DJ Hippo vinyl spinning at 33rpm, devoured by an infinite kaleidoscopic dive that lurches deeper on every kick. params: vinyl.rpm, vinyl.size, vinyl.pixelate, dive.punch, dive.creep, dive.glide, dive.segments, dive.twist, logo.opacity, logo.size, logo.rpm, logo.tiltX, logo.tiltY, logo.pixelate, hippos.opacity, hippos.size, hippos.speed, hippos.pixelate, pixelate _[image, kaleidoscope, zoom, audio-reactive, vinyl]_ ⚡inputs: kick
- **warp-room** — A palette wash warped by living voronoi cells, folded through a mirror and tiled into a breathing wall — bass pushes the warp. params: warp.amount, warp.surge, warp.cells, warp.drift, fold.angle, wall.countX, wall.countY _[displace, voronoi, symmetry, audio-reactive, showcase]_ ⚡inputs: bass
